title: Rubber-band drag selection in progress in the 2D viewport
capture_instructions: In the 2D secondary viewport, click and hold to start a drag selection. While still holding the mouse button down, capture the screen so the rubber-band rectangle is visible. Some points inside the rectangle should be highlighted. The same points should also be highlighted in the 3D viewport on the left.
ui_state: Reclassify Points active, 2D drag selection in progress, rubber-band rectangle visible in 2D viewport, corresponding points highlighted in 3D viewport

annotations.label: 3D viewport — selected points highlighted here too
